headline: Student opportunities built for your campus journey.
intro: Track internships, applications, events, and career resources in one focused student mobile experience.

quickActions.label: Browse internships
quickActions.caption: Jump into the student opportunity feed.

quickActions.label: Continue application
quickActions.caption: Open the latest student application status.

quickActions.label: Career resources
quickActions.caption: Open guides and prep content for students.

quickActions.label: Campus events
quickActions.caption: Move to workshops, talks, and office hours.

opportunities.title: Student Marketing Intern
opportunities.summary: Hybrid internship with weekly mentoring and campus-friendly scheduling.
opportunities.salary: Monthly stipend | Travel covered for events
opportunities.description: Work with the retail growth team on student campaigns, event planning, and social content built for campus audiences.
highlights: Weekly mentoring with the marketing lead.
Hands-on campaign work rather than observation only.

opportunities.title: Junior Data Analyst Placement
opportunities.summary: Placement role focused on dashboards, reporting, and SQL fundamentals.
opportunities.description: Join an operations analytics team to support dashboards, reporting packs, and structured data review tasks.
highlights: Clear progression path into a graduate analyst seat.
Supportive training structure for first placements.

opportunities.title: Campus Ambassador
opportunities.summary: Represent the platform at student events and help peers discover openings.
opportunities.description: Act as the student-facing bridge between campus communities and the Hala Job platform with event and peer outreach work.
highlights: Build communication experience while still studying.
Flexible commitment that can fit alongside coursework.

applications.title: Student Marketing Intern
applications.subtitle: Nexa Retail has reviewed your profile and shortlisted you.
applications.nextStep: Prepare examples of student community work before the intro call.

timeline.label: Application submitted
timeline.detail: Your student profile and details were received successfully.

timeline.label: Shortlisted
timeline.detail: The hiring team wants to move you into a first conversation.

applications.title: Junior Data Analyst Placement
applications.subtitle: Assessment task waiting for submission before Friday.
applications.nextStep: Submit the assessment pack before Friday evening.

timeline.label: Application submitted
timeline.detail: The role application has already been received.

timeline.label: Assessment issued
timeline.detail: A short data task is now waiting for submission.

applications.title: Campus Ambassador
applications.subtitle: Application received and queued for review.
applications.nextStep: Keep your student profile and preferred campus activities updated.

timeline.label: Application submitted
timeline.detail: The student ambassador application is in the review queue.

resources.title: CV lab for students
resources.summary: A guided checklist for turning coursework and campus work into a strong internship CV.
bullets: Translate academic projects into employer-facing outcomes.
Choose stronger verbs and concise results language.
Know what to include before your first internship.

resources.title: Interview practice pack
resources.summary: Student-friendly prompts for behavior questions, confidence, and motivation.
bullets: Common internship interview prompts and how to frame answers.
Ways to discuss classroom experience without underselling it.
A quick structure for confident answers under pressure.

resources.title: Career fair playbook
resources.summary: A short prep guide for getting the most out of campus hiring events.
bullets: Questions to ask recruiters at booths and after talks.
How to follow up after a campus hiring event.
What to carry and what to show on your phone.

events.title: CV Office Hours
events.summary: Drop in with your current CV and get focused feedback before application deadlines.
bullets: Bring your latest CV or draft.
Expect fast feedback on structure, language, and strengths.
Ideal before internship and placement applications.

events.title: Hiring Partners Meet-Up
events.summary: A smaller employer session for students interested in analytics, operations, and marketing.
bullets: Meet recruiters and hiring managers from active campus partner companies.
Prepare one short intro and two role-specific questions.
Use this event to shortlist the next roles to apply for.

profileCheckpoints.label: University
profileCheckpoints.summary: Your university details support student-specific opportunity targeting.
nextSteps: Keep the official university name consistent with your student email.
Update this if you transfer campuses or departments.
Use the same details across applications for cleaner verification.

profileCheckpoints.label: Specialty
profileCheckpoints.summary: Your field of study helps the app surface better-fit internships.
nextSteps: Add the exact concentration or track if relevant.
Mirror strong course themes in your CV and headline.
Use this to filter the most relevant placement roles.

profileCheckpoints.label: Graduation year
profileCheckpoints.summary: Expected graduation helps classify internships versus graduate-track roles.
nextSteps: Make sure the year matches your latest academic plan.
Use accurate timing for summer internships and placements.
Revisit this after any change in study schedule.

profileCheckpoints.label: CV status
profileCheckpoints.summary: A visible campus CV improves application readiness on mobile.
nextSteps: Keep one clean student CV focused on internships and placements.
Update recent projects, society work, and practical tools.
Check that the file opens correctly before heavy application weeks.

completionLabel: A stronger campus profile will unlock better student opportunity matching.
